protein_name: Receptor for Slit proteins, at least for SLIT2, and seems to be involved in angiogenesis and vascular patterning. May mediate the inhibition of primary endothelial cell migration by Slit proteins. Belongs to the immunoglobulin superfamily. ROBO family. Specifically expressed in endothelial cells. Expressed at sites of angiogenesis in different tumor types. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
